title: Fix Invite Text Readability with White Color
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the invite text to be readable against its background, so that I can see the invitation information clearly.
description: Fix the invite text color to white so it is readable against the dark/colored background. The current text color blends into the background making it unreadable.
acceptance_criteria: Invite text is displayed in white color
Text is clearly readable against the background
ux_changes: Invite text color changed to white for readability against the dark background.
comment_summary: Developer changed the text to white and pushed to staging.
